snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedLiteralUserAgent

client = SeedLiteralUserAgent(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)
client.ping()
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedLiteralUserAgent

client = AsyncSeedLiteralUserAgent(
    base_url="https://yourhost.com/path/to/api",
)


async def main() -> None:
    await client.ping()


asyncio.run(main())
